title: nodebug
text: nodebug Return focus to the application. For the character mode Debugger, stop the Debugger. nodebug Return Values None Use Allowed in all component types. Description In the interactive Debugger, the nodebug statement returns focus to the application. If you only want to activate the Debugger for a specific trigger, start the trigger with a debug statement and terminate the trigger with nodebug . In the character mode Debugger, the nodebug statement turns off the Debugger. The nop debugger instruction has no effect on the nodebug statement. The dump and xtrace ProcScript debugger instructions stop their processing when they encounter a nodebug statement. Example: Enabling and Disabling Debugging The following example enables debugging and starts an editing session, then, when the edit session is completed, exits debug mode: operation exec debug ; enter debug mode edit ; start editing session nodebug ; cancel debug mode when form is exited end; exec Copy Related Links Debugging in Character Mode On a client running in character mode, the debug ProcScript statement causes a Debug command line to be displayed at the bottom of the screen. dump Dump ProcScript instructions to the screen or message frame. nop Skip the current statement without executing it. xtrace Start or stop the extended trace facility. debug Start the Uniface Debugger.
